author: IGN YouTube
text:
Caravana 2000 - Official Playtest Trailer
Choose your almost-famous costume and face the dangers of Brazilian chaotic nights. In this action roguelike, survive hordes, farm aura, wield sinister gadgets, and create insane combinations while dancing in the face of danger.
The Playtest for Caravana 2000 is available now. Head over to Steam and add the game to your wishlist.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Bomb The Hill - Official Release Window Trailer
Don't miss the Release Window Trailer for Bomb the Hill, a cinematic VR downhill skateboarding game developed by Poko Dzima VR Studio. Players will race down dangerous mountain roads, weave through traffic at insane speeds, battle desperate rivals, perform tricks, and survive brutal crashes. The game blends realistic downhill mechanics with atmospheric storytelling and a road-trip vibe. Bomb the Hill is launching in Summer 2026 for Meta Quest and Steam VR.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
BrushHammer: Miniature Painter - Official Gameplay Trailer | Upload VR Showcase 2026
BrushHammer is a mixed-reality game that lets you live the miniature painting hobby without spilling paint on your desk! Check out the Brushammer: Miniature Painter trailer to see gameplay from this upcoming game. Pick from a huge collection of minis, kitbash them with different parts and accessories, and paint them using awesome tools like spray cans, airbrushes, shading brushes, decals, and shiny coatings. Show off your masterpiece in your space, send pics to friends, and climb from total newbie to legendary painter in Career Mode. Complete commissions, impress picky judges, and spend your hard-earned points in the hobby shop on new tools, accessories, and upgrades for your creative setup. BrushHammer Miniature Painter will be available on Meta Quest.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
There Are No Ghosts at the Grand - Official Behind-the-Scenes Clip
Join star Alex Brightman (Schmigadoon, Beetlejuice) for a behind-the-scenes look at There Are No Ghosts at the Grand in this latest video for the upcoming first-person story-driven musical, mystery game. Brightman discusses his role in the game as Chris, gives a peek at the story, your mission, and more about what you can expect. The new video also showcases gameplay. There Are No Ghosts at the Grand will be available on Steam, Xbox Series X/S, Xbox on PC, and Xbox Loud in Q4 2026. A demo is out now.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Lanesplit - Official VR Update Release Date Trailer | Upload VR Showcase 2026
Watch the latest Lanesplit trailer for this sports arcade racing game to see what's coming with the VR update, including a new manufacturer, new characters, and SteamVR support. Successfully slip through traffic in VR and avoid disastrous collisions to rack up points from a whole new perspective in Lanesplit. Redline all-new electric motorcycles with elite acceleration and top speed, navigate inclement weather with the addition of thunderstorms, and enjoy appearances from real-world motorcycle influencers. Lanesplit's VR update will be available on Steam on June 23, 2026.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Sell Lemons: How to Solve the Sewer Maze in (All Levers)
Running a booming lemon stand in Sell Lemons is a great way to make cash, but what hides beneath the surface? Drop down the manhole to discover a secret sewer maze filled with levers, twists, and dead ends. If you pull the levers in the exact right order, you can navigate the confusing tunnels, locate the highly coveted Sewer Key, and claim the ultimate reward.

In this Roblox Sell Lemons video guide, we show you the exact lever order to easily navigate the tricky sewer maze. Follow our step-by-step walkthrough to find the Sewer Key, open the locked door, and unlock the secret money tree to earn the Cosmic Farmer achievement.

https://www.ign.com/wikis/sell-lemons-roblox/How\_to\_Get\_the\_Sewer\_Key\_in\_the\_Maze

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mina the Hollower - How to Defeat the "Impossible" Intro Boss
Did you know you can defeat the introductory boss in Mina the Hollower, even on your first playthrough? We’ll show you how to take down the Nether Kraken in this quick guide! 

Mina the Hollower released on May 28, 2026 and is available for Nintendo Switch, Switch 2, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and Steam.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Echo Weaver: 16 Minutes of 4K 60FPS Gameplay
Dive into the time loop mysteries of Echo Weaver with this extended 16-minute gameplay showcase. Watch as we navigate through challenging precision platforming, gather time pickups, and unravel the secrets hidden within this unique puzzle box. As the last of the Weavers, you'll need to master the clock to unlock gates, heal, and explore the remnants of a collapsed utopian society, all captured in stunning 4K at a smooth 60 frames per second.
 
Echo Weaver is an upcoming time loop "metroidbrainia" developed by Moonlight Kids and published by Akupara Games. In this inventive 2D platformer, time serves as your most valuable currency and only resource, challenging players to use knowledge and secrets rather than traditional upgrades or gear to progress through the glitching world of Provenance. The game will be available on PC via Steam, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and will be a Day One release on Xbox Game Pass.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Gears of War: E-Day Gameplay Preview & New Details Explained - Unlocked Clips
The incredible cinematic trailer was just the beginning. We went behind closed doors at the Xbox Games Showcase to get the real gameplay details on Gears of War: E-Day!

#Xbox #GearsOfWar #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
UFC 6 - 9 Essential Fighting Tips You Need to Know
There are many facets of Mixed Martial Arts, from stand-up, the ground game, submissions, clinches, etc. So if you need a crash course on how to play UFC 6, here's a list of 9 tips that will surely help you find more success in the Octogon.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
How Steven Spielberg Made Aliens His Ultimate Muse
Some of Steven Spielberg's most iconic work has come with some little green men. His work with extra terrestrials has run the gamut from visually groundbreaking to emotionally gut-wrenching all the way to... frankly not very good. But one thing remains true for each of Spielberg's forays into cosmic territory; aliens represent something much more personal to the filmmaker than meets the eye. For this Art of the Scene, we're looking at Spielberg's Art of the Alien, and how the father of the modern blockbuster has evolved his use of E.T.'s throughout his career.

With Disclosure Day being Spielberg's most recent alien adventure there's a through-line from the iconic director's earliest teenage work, through Close Encounters of the Third Kind, E.T. The Extra Terrestrial and War of the Worlds. Even including the murkier, hair-splitting stops along the way for A.I. Artificial Intelligence and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull, Spielberg has made a habit of framing very personal ideas with fantastic beings from outer space.

This Art of the Scene was written by Siddhant Adlakha, edited by Justin Donaldson and produced by Clint Gage.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Gothic 1 Remake Review
Gothic 1 Remake reviewed by Jarrett Green on PC, also available on Xbox Series S|X and PlayStation 5.

Gothic 1 Remake is undeniably the best way to play this cult classic RPG – and not just because its an old game that has become hard to run on new PCs as time forgets it. The scope of the changes are largely quality-of-life improvements, making it easier to look at, listen to, and interact with on basic levels, even if it still doesn’t make for a bug-free experience. Its still-one-dimensional combat, uneven pacing, and disappointingly dull second half have aged like milk. Yet, the earnest and ahead of its time worldbuilding remains a high watermark for the genre, feeling like a clever and fresh take even all these years later, and that’s bolstered by new side quests that only enhance it.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Rustmourne - Official Gameplay Trailer | Upload VR Showcase 2026
Take a look at the Gameplay Trailer for Rustmourne, an upcoming sci-fi horror VR survival game. Players will traverse the corridors of an ancient, derelict structure, and face the tortured beings in it: hide, run, or cut off their limbs to survive. Rustmourne is coming soon to SteamVR.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Wandering Village: The Last Leviathan - Official Announcement Trailer
A new DLC introducing a massive amphibian creature, complete with new buildings, resources, a different tech tree and hours of fresh content. Launching alongside it is a big free update that deepens the interaction with both Onbu and the new creature, adding new body temperature and mood mechanics, cosmetics, as well as the brand-new Arctic Ocean biome.
The Wandering Village: The Last Leviathan will be available on PC, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and Nintendo Switch 2.
